# 2.低加密指数攻击

# 一：题目类型

[[P09.低加密指数攻击]]

# 二：题目

```python
from Crypto.Util.number import *
from gmpy2 import *
flag = b'NSSCTF{******}'

p = getPrime(512)
q = getPrime(512)
n = p*q
e = 3
phi = (p-1)*(q-1)
m = bytes_to_long(flag)
c = powmod(m, e, n)

print(f'n = {n}')
print(f'e = {e}')
print(f'c = {c}')
'''
n = 
e = 3
c = [[]]
'''
```

# 三：解题思路

![[Pasted image 20241030144225.png]]

# 四：解题代码

```python
from Crypto.Util.number import *

from gmpy2 import *

n = 

e = 3

c = 

  

for k in range(100000):

    cc = c + k*n

    res = iroot(cc, e)

    if res[1]:

        m = res[0]

        break

  

print(long_to_bytes(m))

print('k:',k) # 11

```
